sections.section_purpose: To detail the technical aspects and compatibility of the proposed solution.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how the proposed services will be compatible with existing ICT environments, include a test plan, and ensure alignment with ITIL v4 standards.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the management and delivery of services, including locations and performance management.
sections.response_guidance: Detail the service delivery approach, including geographic locations, milestone achievement, performance management, and reporting requirements.

sections.section_purpose: To provide information on personnel management and corporate governance.
sections.response_guidance: Explain the approach to personnel management, including stand down procedures.

sections.section_purpose: To address pricing and commercial terms.
sections.response_guidance: Provide detailed pricing information and confirm acceptance of commercial terms.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the security measures and compliance with standards.
sections.response_guidance: Detail the security framework and controls relevant to the engagement.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate past performance and technical merit.
sections.response_guidance: Provide case studies and examples of past performance that align with the evaluation criteria.

sections.section_purpose: To ensure compliance with legal and policy requirements.
sections.response_guidance: Confirm compliance with legal requirements and additional standards.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the resources provided by the Commonwealth.
sections.response_guidance: Describe how the provided resources will be utilized in service management.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the approach to handling alternative proposals.
sections.response_guidance: Explain how alternative proposals will be managed and submitted.
Detail the management of intellectual property, including rights and restrictions.
